ddls:
CREATE TABLE "health_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health data entry */,
  "race_ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race/ethnicity category */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of data collection */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the health metric */,
  "black_non_hispanic" REAL /* Health metric for Black, non-Hispanic population */,
  "hispanic" REAL /* Health metric for Hispanic population */,
  "white_non_hispanic" REAL /* Health metric for White, non-Hispanic population */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_race_ethnicity_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_ethnicity_id") REFERENCES race_ethnicities ("race_ethnicity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES health_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_ethnicities" (
  "race_ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race/ethnicity category */,
  "race_ethnicity_name" TEXT /* Name of the race/ethnicity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race/ethnicity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The actual year of data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the health metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the health metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the health metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health data being accessed */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES health_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the health data used for the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual, trend) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES health_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_sources" (
  "metric_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the metric-source relationship */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health metric */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_sources_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES health_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each check */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health data being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the check was performed */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the data is valid */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the validity check */,
  "checked_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_checked_by FOREIGN KEY ("checked_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES health_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health data being analyzed */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the method used for analysis */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES analysis_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES health_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis that led to the recommendation */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Text of the recommendation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES data_analysis ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the user group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_group_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user group */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user joined the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_group_memberships_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES user_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_group_memberships_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
